channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Alien Isolation 2 Trailer Revealed At Summer Game Fest
item.content:encoded:
A new trailer was shown at Summer Game Fest for Alien Isolation 2, the long-awaited sequel to the survival horror game set in the Alien universe.

No release date or window was revealed, but some new footage showcased the brand new setting, as it breaks the boundaries from a ship to a colony planet.

More Alien Isolation 2 Details

The footage shown during Summer Game Fest was pre-alpha footage, but it revealed that the setting is expanding onto a colony planet, with the frightening Xenomorph continuing to hunt you down.

As expected, it’ll hunt you down whilst lurking in vents and passageways, but with new environments like dark woodlands and crash sites, it’s bound to be a step up from the original, which was released over a decade ago by now.

Check out the trailer here:

This was just one of the many announcements during Summer Game Fest. If you’re looking to stay up to date on everything else, check out our live updates for the showcase here.

Are you excited to dive into the long-awaited sequel for Alien Isolation 2? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about the drop off for Nintendo Switch 2 sales in Japan, as well as when the Steam Machine is set to ship.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

item.title: Resident Evil Code Veronica Remake Release Window Revealed at Summer Game Fest
item.content:encoded:
Capcom made a huge announcement at Summer Game Fest today, revealing the highly anticipated remake of Resident Evil Code: Veronica and its release window.

Resident Evil Code Veronica has been rumored to be in development for quite some time. It is said to be one of two new remakes in the series, alongside Resident Evil Zero. Various details, including release windows and development teams, have been leaked, but players remained uncertain until today, when Capcom finally decided to reveal the information.

Resident Evil Code Veronica Remake Release Set for 2027

The Summer Game Fest panel for Resident Evil Code Veronica Remake provided players with quite a bit of new information. Players got to see enhanced visuals across the board, with higher fidelity and performance across both cutscenes and what seemed like gameplay elements. Towards the end of the trailer, players were also given a release window: the upcoming remake is set to arrive in 2027. Check out the reveal trailer below:

In the story of Resident Evil Code Veronica, players follow Claire Redfield as she continues her search for her brother, Chris Redfield. Her quest leads her to Paris, where she is captured and trafficked to Rockfort Prison. However, the prison comes under sudden attack, allowing Claire to escape, only to discover that the T-virus has broken out and zombies have overrun the facility. With the undead on the loose, she must scavenge for weapons and ammunition to survive. Claire’s journey also takes her to an Antarctic base, where she seeks clues to expose the Umbrella Corporation’s dark motives and uncover the truth behind the mysterious and unsettling Ashford twins.

In other news, here’s everything that was announced during Summer Game Fest 2026. Additionally, a producer on the Resident Evil franchise has hinted that a future game will be set in Japan, a location the series has yet to visit. What are your thoughts on the Resident Evil: Vode Veronica remake’s reveal trailer, and will you be purchasing it when it releases in 2027? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about the release date and trailer of a new Hot Wheels game being revealed. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Summer Games Fest Finale Will Be a Single-Player Narrative Title
item.content:encoded:
Geoff Keighley has revealed that the final announcement of Summer Games Fest will be a single-player narrative experience. He announced this on social media, thanking players for their feedback.

This follows the backlash to the final announcement that the 2025 Game Awards would be Highguard. A live service multiplayer game. Of course, Highguard lasted less than 2 months as an active game before being taken offline.

Summer Games Fest Surprises Are Expected

Summer Games Fest will feature plenty of surprises. However, there are certain things known about the show. For example, Paramount Gaming was recently formed, and that studio’s debut game will be shown. Additionally, Star Wars Zero Company will be featured. A gameplay trailer for that title will be shown.

This is the time of year when games take center stage. Sony recently held its PlayStation State of Play presentation. Wolverine was heavily featured, showcasing its blood-filled gameplay. A God of War game featuring Laufey, Kratos’ wife. Check out everything announced as part of that showcase here.

Insider Gaming will continue to monitor Summer Games Fest and report any updates as the show airs. Learn more about the failure of Highguard at this link. Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

Minecraft Dungeons 2 Release Date & Price Leaks Early

The price and release date for Minecraft Dungeons 2 have leaked on the Nintendo online store ahead of an official reveal.

Summer Game Fest 2026 Showcase—Everything Announced

A huge live broadcast with the Summer Game Fest 2026 showcase is set to bring about a flood of news and major reveals for gamers.

Paramount Unveils New Game Studio; First Reveal Coming Today

Skydance Interactive and Skydance New Media have been merged into one to create Paramount Games Studio. Here are more details.

No Rest for the Wicked XBOX Release Delayed Due to Series S

No Rest for the Wicked’s XBOX release has been delayed due to Series S optimization issues. Here are more details.

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: LEC Spring Playoffs 2026 Finals Preview: Who Will Lift the Trophy?
item.content:encoded:
The LEC Spring Playoffs 2026 will come to an end this weekend with G2 Esports, Movistar KOI, and Karmine Corp.

EMEA has uncovered its top three League of Legends teams, but only one can lift the Spring 2026 trophy.

G2 Esports have already secured their place in the final and, as a result, have automatically qualified for LoL MSI 2026.

They will await the winners of MKOI and KCorp, who will face off yet again in what will likely be another explosive best-of-five.

Karmine Corp vs Movistar KOI

The rivalry between French and Spanish fans means meetings between these two teams are always heated, and this one will be especially tense with MSI qualification on the line too.

So heated, in fact, that a recent match between the two led to both MKOI and KCorp receiving fines following the LEC Madrid Roadtrip.

Both teams have shown very high highs this year. However, KCorp have to be the slight favourites here.

In every multi-game series between the two teams this year, KCorp has won. Twice in Esports World Cup qualifiers, the aforementioned Spring 2-1, and a close 3-2 in the LEC Versus Playoffs.

Though MKOI have taken games in most of those series, and the team recently pushed G2 to five games in the Upper Bracket final.

MKOI midlaner Joseph Joon ‘Jojopyun’ Pyun is in the form of his career, but he will need his teammates to step up.

How MKOI’s sidelanes each deal with their lane mismatches will likely decide the series.

Can G2 Esports Defend Their LEC Title?

Earlier this year, G2 Esports won LEC Versus to claim the organisation’s 18th LEC/EU LCS title.

They will be favourites to do so, having already defeated both MKOI and KCorp on their way to the final.

Though G2 had to reverse sweep MKOI to get this far, after a disastrous start to the series.

Similarly, in the LEC Versus Final against KCorp, G2 had to rely on a ridiculous play by Rasumus ‘Caps’ Winther at Elder to win the fifth match.

G2 have shown vulnerabilities, but also an x-factor that helps them get out of any situation that other LEC teams haven’t been able to overcome.

And after G2’s First Stand heroics saw them sweep both LCK teams 3-0, hopes for this roster are at an all-time high.

Who do you expect to win the LEC Spring Playoffs? Share your predictions with us on the Insider Gaming Discord.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/lec-spring-playoffs-2026-finals-preview-who-will-lift-the-trophy/

item.title: Minecraft Dungeons 2 Release Date & Price Leaks Early
item.content:encoded:
The store page for Minecraft Dungeons 2 on the Nintendo Switch 2 has seemingly leaked the price and release date for the upcoming sequel.

Originally announced back in March 2026 with a short and brief trailer, it seems like there will be a quick turnaround between announcement and release, with the hack-and-slash title joining an already stacked September line-up.

Minecraft Dungeons 2 Releasing September 29, 2026

It seems like some eagle-eyed fans have noticed that the store page for Minecraft Dungeons 2 has been updated, revealing a September 29, 2026, release date. It joins an already packed September release window, with every game avoiding November for some reason…

Reddit user of the store, alerting fans that Minecraft Dungeons 2’s page update had been made, and lo and behold, if you head to it for yourself, you’ll see the changes clear as day.

Priced at $29.99 USD, a host of other details have been made available, including an estimated game file size of 6.8GB, as well as both local and online four-player multiplayer—as expected based on the original.

To top things off, pre-order details have appeared, with two hero skins, the Twisted cape, and the Twisted chicken pet up for grabs. These leaks have likely arrived ahead of an official reveal during either Summer Game Fest or the XBOX Games Showcase: expect a new trailer in the coming days.

What do you make of the leak? Will you be picking up Minecraft Dungeons 2 during a busy month of September? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about the new Paramount game studio and its first game in development, as well as the new Hot Wheels game Infinite Rush whose release date got leaked ahead of a reveal.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Summer Game Fest 2026 Showcase—Everything Announced
item.content:encoded:
Summer Game Fest 2026 is one of the most intriguing showcases in a while, as the slate of games on the horizon starts to become clear, all while tussling to avoid the looming behemoth of Grand Theft Auto 6.

The PlayStation State of Play showcase earlier this week showed how wide a berth titles are giving to GTA 6, avoiding its November release date, and, as a result, September 2026 and February 2027 are already looking busy—and there are still some big reveals to come.

Unlike State of Play, the Summer Game Fest 2026 showcase features titles across all platforms, and the two-hour show is set to be packed with reveals, world premieres, and plenty more.

All Summer Game Fest 2026 Showcase Announcements

As games are shown, they will be updated below in the order they appeared. If something is missing, please let us know in the comments. Trailers will also be added as they become available.

Resident Evil: Veronica

Cuphead Sequel & Mighty Cuphead Adventure

Alien Isolation 2

Gen Atlas

Blood Message

Stranger Than Heaven

Haex

Dead By Daylight

Sand Raiders of Sophie

Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag Resynced

MOBILE APP

Available on iOS & Android

Paramount Unveils New Game Studio; First Reveal Coming Today

Skydance Interactive and Skydance New Media have been merged into one to create Paramount Games Studio. Here are more details.

No Rest for the Wicked XBOX Release Delayed Due to Series S

No Rest for the Wicked’s XBOX release has been delayed due to Series S optimization issues. Here are more details.

Escape from Tarkov: Arena Bug Inspired New CheckPoint: Knives Out Mode

Battlestate Games has added a new mode to Escape from Tarkov: Arena named CheckPoint: Knives Out, which adds a melee-only event.

New Hot Wheels Game ‘Infinite Rush’ Release Date and Trailer Revealed

A new Hot Wheels game, Infinite Rush, is in development, with details on the release date and trailer revealed in a new report.

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Everything Coming in Rocket League Season 23
item.content:encoded:
Rocket League Season 23 is coming soon and is going to be themed around the upcoming football World Cup.

Epic Games and Psyonix have released full details about what Rocket League fans can look forward to in the upcoming update.

There is a lot of buzz surrounding the game following the RLCS Paris Major and the announcement of Unreal Engine 6.

As well as World Cup cosmetics, the update is also bringing huge quality-of-life improvements to the game, including side-selection after a demo.

Here is everything new coming in Rocket League Season 23.

Rocket League Season 23 Release Date

Rocket League Season 23 will release on Wednesday, June 10 at 9:00 AM PT (12:00 PM EDT).

Rocket League World Cup Content

Unlike EA Sports FC 26’s World Cup mode, Epic Games has secured the FIFA World Cup 2026 licensing for Rocket League.

The Rocket League x FIFA World Cup 2026 limited-time event (LTE) will run until July 20, 9 AM PT.

It will also see the release of a World Cup-themed Arena Variant called United Futura.

Once Season 23 releases, players will be able to pick their nation by July 13 9:00 AM PT (12:00 PM EDT) to claim a free Octane Decal and Title.

This decal will track players’ performances for a global leaderboard.

Once the World Cup ends, every player will receive a “World Cup Champion” Player Title, with the winning country’s flag, and all 47 other World Cup Decals.

Players who played for the winning country will also receive a gold variant of the title.

Additionally, LTE Challenges will reward a Goal Explosion, a Boost, and a universal Decal celebrating the football tournament.

Completing 10 out of the 14 World Cup Challenges will then unlock the Hyundai Ioniq 6 Car Body.

Rocket League Quality of Life Upgrades

As well as the World Cup content, Psyonix is also adding a ton of quality-of-life improvements to the 10-year-old game.

In possibly one of the biggest changes ever, Rocket League will now allow players to choose what side they respawn on.

The total list of new features coming in Rocket League Season 23 are:

  • Demo Respawn Control
  • Custom Training Velocity and Car Pitch, and Local Starting Boost Control
  • Ball and Car Speed Graphs
  • Streamer Anonymizer
  • Hitbox Visualization
  • Auto-Skip Goal Replays
  • Improved Friend Presence to include score and time remaining 
  • Goal Scorer’s View in Replays

Rocket League Jynxzi Event

Rocket League is also partnering with content creator Nicholas ‘Jynxzi’ Stewart for a mini event.

Those who end up in a match with the popular streamer will receive Jynxzi-themed cosmetics.

If you win on the same team as Jynxzi, you’ll get the Dad’s Reinforced Chair. Defeat him, and you’ll get the Jynxzi’s OG Chair Topper.

Win or Lose, you’ll also receive the BAZALRIGHT Decal. 

Rocket Pass Premium

Season 23’s Rocket Pass Premium will unlock two new vehicles:

  • •Ryza Trophy (Octane Hitbox) – first unlock
  • •Ryza T60  (Breakout Hitbox) – in the higher Tiers

The Pass also features new Boosts, new Trails, fresh Antennas, and Player Anthems built for the season.

What other features would you like to see added to Rocket League? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord.

And relive the Paris Major Grand Final as Vatira furthered his claim of Rocket League GOAT.

MOBILE APP
